languages.text: "Я легко расшифрую их для вас, уважаемый генетор Ферренц. То, что вы чувствуете, — это радость и благодарность. За них отвечают некоторые элементарные части плоти".

traits.locale_text: "Я легко расшифрую их для вас, уважаемый генетор Ферренц. То, что вы чувствуете, — это радость и благодарность. За них отвечают некоторые элементарные части плоти".

languages.text: "I can easily decipher them for you, esteemed Genetor Ferrenz. What you are experiencing is joy and gratitude. Certain basic components of the flesh cause these feelings."
languages.original_text: "Я легко расшифрую их для вас, уважаемый генетор Ферренц. То, что вы чувствуете, — это радость и благодарность. За них отвечают некоторые элементарные части плоти".

traits.locale_text: "I can easily decipher them for you, esteemed Genetor Ferrenz. What you are experiencing is joy and gratitude. Certain basic parts of the flesh account for these feelings."
"I can easily decipher them for you, esteemed Genetor Ferrenz. What you are experiencing is joy and gratitude. Certain basic parts of the flesh account for these feelings."
"I can easily decipher them for you, esteemed Genetor Ferrenz. What you are experiencing is joy and gratitude. Certain basic components of the flesh cause these feelings."
"I can easily decipher them for you, esteemed Genetor Ferrenz. What you are experiencing is joy and gratitude. Certain basic components of the flesh cause these feelings."

languages.text: «Puedo descifrarlos fácilmente por usted, estimado genetor Ferrenz. Lo que experimenta es alegría y gratitud. Ciertos componentes básicos de la carne causan estas sensaciones».
languages.original_text: "I can easily decipher them for you, esteemed Genetor Ferrenz. What you are experiencing is joy and gratitude. Certain basic components of the flesh cause these feelings."

traits.locale_text: «Puedo descifrarlos fácilmente por usted, estimado genetor Ferrenz. Lo que experimenta es alegría y gratitud. Ciertos componentes básicos de la carne causan estas sensaciones».

languages.text: “尊贵的基因士费伦茨，我可以轻松帮您破译。您此刻感受到的是喜悦与感激。血肉的某些基础成分会引发这些情感。”
languages.original_text: "I can easily decipher them for you, esteemed Genetor Ferrenz. What you are experiencing is joy and gratitude. Certain basic components of the flesh cause these feelings."

traits.locale_text: “尊贵的基因士费伦茨，我可以轻松帮您破译。您此刻感受到的是喜悦与感激。血肉的某些基础成分会引发这些情感。”

languages.text: « Je peux aisément les déchiffrer pour vous, vénérable genetor Ferrenz. Les sentiments que vous éprouvez, à savoir la joie et la gratitude, sont induits par certains composants de base de la chair. »
languages.original_text: "I can easily decipher them for you, esteemed Genetor Ferrenz. What you are experiencing is joy and gratitude. Certain basic components of the flesh cause these feelings."

traits.locale_text: « Je peux aisément les déchiffrer pour vous, vénérable genetor Ferrenz. Les sentiments que vous éprouvez, à savoir la joie et la gratitude, sont induits par certains composants de base de la chair. »

languages.text: "Onları kolayca deşifre edebilirim saygıdeğer Genetör Ferrenz. Deneyimlediğiniz şey neşe ve minnettarlık. Etin bazı temel bileşenleri bu duygulara neden olur."
languages.original_text: "I can easily decipher them for you, esteemed Genetor Ferrenz. What you are experiencing is joy and gratitude. Certain basic components of the flesh cause these feelings."

traits.locale_text: "Onları kolayca deşifre edebilirim saygıdeğer Genetör Ferrenz. Deneyimlediğiniz şey neşe ve minnettarlık. Etin bazı temel bileşenleri bu duygulara neden olur."

languages.text: 「簡単に解読できますよ、尊敬するジェネトル・フェレンツ。あなたが感じているのは喜びと感謝です。肉体の基本的な成分がこれらの感情を引き起こしているのです。」
languages.original_text: "I can easily decipher them for you, esteemed Genetor Ferrenz. What you are experiencing is joy and gratitude. Certain basic components of the flesh cause these feelings."

traits.locale_text: 「簡単に解読できますよ、尊敬するジェネトル・フェレンツ。あなたが感じているのは喜びと感謝です。肉体の基本的な成分がこれらの感情を引き起こしているのです。」

languages.text: "Ich kann sie problemlos für Euch entschlüsseln, geschätzter Genetor Ferrenz. Was Ihr erlebt, sind Freude und Dankbarkeit. Gewisse Grundkomponenten des Fleisches verursachen diese Gefühle."
languages.original_text: "I can easily decipher them for you, esteemed Genetor Ferrenz. What you are experiencing is joy and gratitude. Certain basic components of the flesh cause these feelings."

traits.locale_text: "Ich kann sie problemlos für Euch entschlüsseln, geschätzter Genetor Ferrenz. Was Ihr erlebt, sind Freude und Dankbarkeit. Gewisse Grundkomponenten des Fleisches verursachen diese Gefühle."
